title: Sovereign Procurement Trust Room
thesis: A buyer diligence question becomes an auditable Trust Room rather than an improvised sales response.
problem: Enterprise and sovereign buyers ask whether an AI workflow system can be trusted, governed, audited, and safely adopted.
mission: Create a Trust Room artifact that answers procurement questions with evidence boundaries, proof routes, reviewer decisions, and safe public claims.
why: Procurement trust is a high-value bottleneck. Solving it converts interest into qualified institutional demand.
goals: Make proof legible to non-technical executives
rsi: The Trust Room becomes a reusable artifact for future procurement conversations only after it survives review, claim-boundary validation, and Evidence Docket anchoring.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates mission funding, builder proof work, reviewer validation, proof-card registration, credential issuance, and reputation updates for trust-room specialists.
